basic_details.job_title: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Non Creamy Layer) (Delhi).

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (MS/MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Ophthalmology, Post Graduate Degree (MS/DNB) in Orthopedics
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Ophthalmology): Post Graduate Degree (MS/MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Ophthalmology. Senior Resident (Orthopedics): Post Graduate Degree (MS/DNB) in Orthopedics.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Resident posts at Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 03 June 2026. There is no separate last date for submitting an application form prior to the walk-in.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts at Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital. These are distributed across two specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Senior Resident (Ophthalmology), a Post Graduate Degree (MS/MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Ophthalmology is required. For Senior Resident (Orthopedics), a Post Graduate Degree (MS/DNB) in Orthopedics is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67,700/- to Rs. 2,08,700/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The application process is a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to appear for the interview at the specified venue on the given date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, recent passport-size photographs, and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The official notification should be checked for the exact venue address. However, the hospital is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with a pincode of 110064.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts at Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital will be based on an Interview.
